results.evidence: - Fix applied at `core/media_processor.py` lines 412-414: added `if img_white.ndim == 2: img_white = img_white[..., np.newaxis]` - Verified: `(H,W,3) + (H,W,1)` produces shape `(H,W,3)` without error; `(H,W,3) + (H,W)` still fails with the exact ValueError from your logs - Test suite: 264 passed, 1 skipped before and after fix (no regression) - Committed as `4a8b38d`: "fix: prevent broadcasting error in swap_face_batch by reshaping img_white to 3D"

lastCheckpoint.summary: Fix committed. Your error was: **Root cause:** `cv2.warpAffine` returns the same dimensionality as its input, so the 2D `img_white` array stays 2D `(H, W)`.
